title: PsExec-style Remote Service Installation (Event 7045)
description: Detects creation of a Windows service (System Event 7045) whose binary path is a randomly named or admin-share executable, the on-host artifact of PsExec / impacket smbexec / paexec lateral movement. Pairs with the existing process-creation PsExec rules by catching the service-control-manager record.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and (('Event ID' = '7045') and ( (('Service Name' like '*PSEXESVC*' or 'Service Name' like '*PAExec*' or 'Service Name' like '*RemCom*' or 'Service Name' like '*csexec*')) or (('Service File Name' like '*ADMIN$*' or 'Service File Name' like '*Temp*' or 'Service File Name' like '*system32*' or 'Service File Name' like '*.bat*')) ))
falsepositives: Legitimate third-party service installs and software deployment agents
